architectureNotes: Wordsearch is an ELEMENT (catalog name 'Word Search', dataType 'wordsearch'), NOT an assessment widget. 'wordsearch' is absent from support/module-setup.ts ASSESSMENT_DATA_TYPES, so resolveDropTarget routes it to the canvas — it drops onto the Instructions-for-Students page (#desktop_view) via cy.dropComponent('Word Search') (matched by widget name), not into a Generic Step column. config.js marks it isDroppable:true.
Canvas wrapper is .component-holder.wordsearch[wordsearch-template] (there is NO data-type attribute on the wrapper, so the directive attribute [wordsearch-template] is the stable selector hook).

Hidden Word entry #hiddenWordInput is contenteditable (ng-model textData) with pattern='[a-zA-Z]+' + ng-pattern-restrict; onKeyPress blocks spaces (charCode 32), stops typing past 13 chars, and triggers Add on Enter. So numbers, spaces, and >13-char words are rejected at input time by construction.

ADD (.add-btn → onAddButtonClick) pushes scope.textData.toUpperCase() into fieldData.settings.wordList: words are stored UPPERCASE (case-insensitive), de-duplicated via $.inArray, and capped at scope.maxWordCount = 13 words.

WORDS section = .wordListHolder → repeated .wordListRepeat rows (.wordData text + .deleteWord button). The delete button is ng-disabled when wordList.length == 1 — the WORDS section cannot be fully emptied from the author DOM. Show Words toggles fadeInWords/fadeOutWords (no DOM removal).

Settings panel #word-settings-panel (title 'Word Search') exposes default-checked checkboxes #add-show-me / #header-visibility / #instr-visibility / #showWrds-visibility, a Grid 'Shuffle' button (.shuffleBtn), outline radios input[name='outline'] (outline | outlineBg), and a colour picker .colorPickerInputBox (default #7eb1eb).

Grid generation (.puzzle-holder → .puzzleSquare with .addedWord highlight), the blue word-line highlight, and the strikethrough on solve all come from wordfind.js at runtime — these plus Preview/Reader solve interactions, persistence-after-reload, undo, focus management, a11y contrast, and grid resize are deferred (it.skip) with explicit reasons.

NOT YET LIVE-VERIFIED against a running authoring instance: all selectors are source-derived from the templates above. A single run against AUTHORING_LAUNCH_URL is required to confirm the canvas drop + #word-settings-panel selectors + the add/delete DOM paths.
